tools.name: associateDomain.postOperation
tools.description: Specifies a domain to be associated to Amazon WorkLink.

tools.name: associateWebsiteAuthorizationProvider.postOperation
tools.description: Associates a website authorization provider with a specified fleet. This is used to authorize users against associated websites in the company network.

tools.name: associateWebsiteCertificateAuthority.postOperation
tools.description: Imports the root certificate of a certificate authority (CA) used to obtain TLS certificates used by associated websites within the company network.

tools.name: createFleet.postOperation
tools.description: Creates a fleet. A fleet consists of resources and the configuration that delivers associated websites to authorized users who download and set up the Amazon WorkLink app.

tools.name: deleteFleet.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a fleet. Prevents users from accessing previously associated websites.

tools.name: describeAuditStreamConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Describes the configuration for delivering audit streams to the customer account.

tools.name: describeCompanyNetworkConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Describes the networking configuration to access the internal websites associated with the specified fleet.

tools.name: describeDevice.postOperation
tools.description: Provides information about a user's device.

tools.name: describeDevicePolicyConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Describes the device policy configuration for the specified fleet.

tools.name: describeDomain.postOperation
tools.description: Provides information about the domain.

tools.name: describeFleetMetadata.postOperation
tools.description: Provides basic information for the specified fleet, excluding identity provider, networking, and device configuration details.

tools.name: describeIdentityProviderConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Describes the identity provider configuration of the specified fleet.

tools.name: describeWebsiteCertificateAuthority.postOperation
tools.description: Provides information about the certificate authority.

tools.name: disassociateDomain.postOperation
tools.description: Disassociates a domain from Amazon WorkLink. End users lose the ability to access the domain with Amazon WorkLink.

tools.name: disassociateWebsiteAuthorizationProvider.postOperation
tools.description: Disassociates a website authorization provider from a specified fleet. After the disassociation, users can't load any associated websites that require this authorization provider.

tools.name: disassociateWebsiteCertificateAuthority.postOperation
tools.description: Removes a certificate authority (CA).

tools.name: listDevices.postOperation
tools.description: Retrieves a list of devices registered with the specified fleet.

tools.name: listDomains.postOperation
tools.description: Retrieves a list of domains associated to a specified fleet.

tools.name: listFleets.postOperation
tools.description: Retrieves a list of fleets for the current account and Region.

tools.name: listWebsiteAuthorizationProviders.postOperation
tools.description: Retrieves a list of website authorization providers associated with a specified fleet.

tools.name: listWebsiteCertificateAuthorities.postOperation
tools.description: Retrieves a list of certificate authorities added for the current account and Region.

tools.name: restoreDomainAccess.postOperation
tools.description: Moves a domain to ACTIVE status if it was in the INACTIVE status.

tools.name: revokeDomainAccess.postOperation
tools.description: Moves a domain to INACTIVE status if it was in the ACTIVE status.

tools.name: signOutUser.postOperation
tools.description: Signs the user out from all of their devices. The user can sign in again if they have valid credentials.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Retrieves a list of tags for the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds or overwrites one or more tags for the specified resource, such as a fleet. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value. If a resource already has a tag with the same key, this operation updates its value.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes one or more tags from the specified resource.

tools.name: updateAuditStreamConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Updates the audit stream configuration for the fleet.

tools.name: updateCompanyNetworkConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Updates the company network configuration for the fleet.

tools.name: updateDevicePolicyConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Updates the device policy configuration for the fleet.

tools.name: updateDomainMetadata.postOperation
tools.description: Updates domain metadata, such as DisplayName.

tools.name: updateFleetMetadata.postOperation
tools.description: Updates fleet metadata, such as DisplayName.

tools.name: updateIdentityProviderConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Updates the identity provider configuration for the fleet.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
